description: Address 5 issues from the sprint 3 code review: (1) PATCH no-op for uncomplete, (2) prompt injection in suggestions, (3) triplicated fallback sort, (4) non-list parse guard, (5) email utility blocks event loop.
steps: Fix PATCH /api/tasks/{task_id} to call uncomplete_task MCP tool when completed=false
Sanitize user content in suggestions prompt to prevent prompt injection
Add isinstance(suggestions, list) guard after json.loads in suggestions endpoint
Extract fallback sort logic in handleAiPrioritize to a helper function
Wrap synchronous Gmail API calls in asyncio.to_thread in email_notifications.py
acceptance_criteria: PATCH endpoint calls uncomplete_task MCP tool when completed=false
Suggestions prompt delimits user content to prevent injection
Suggestions endpoint validates parsed JSON is a list before iterating
handleAiPrioritize uses a single helper for fallback sort logic
Email utility functions use asyncio.to_thread for synchronous API calls
Backend Python files compile without errors
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && python3 -m py_compile app/main.py && python3 -m py_compile app/utils/email_notifications.py
findings: All 5 review issues fixed. Backend py_compile passes for main.py and email_notifications.py. Frontend build passes with no lint errors. The uncomplete_task MCP tool name matches the pattern used by complete_task (google-tasks server). asyncio.to_thread wraps the synchronous _send_email helper so the event loop stays unblocked.
